nasb.text: Then Pharaoh also called for the wise men and the sorcerers, and they also, the magicians of Egypt, did the same with their secret arts.

esv.text: Then Pharaoh summoned the wise men and the sorcerers, and they, the magicians of Egypt, also did the same by their secret arts.

cnv.text: 於是，法老也把智慧人和行法術的人召了來；他們本是埃及的術士，也用他們的巫術照樣行了。

ccb.text: 法老召他的谋士和巫师前来，这些人是埃及的术士，他们也用邪术如法炮制。
